subject: A green-yellow blobby creature with crystalline teeth sitting in what appears to be a refuse or industrial setting
description: A squat, round, green-yellow sludge creature sits contentedly in what appears to be a waste or disposal area. Its body is a muted green-yellow color rather than purple, distinguishing it as the Alolan regional form. It has small white crystalline or gem-like protrusions along its mouth that resemble teeth or mineral deposits. Its expression appears dull but placid. The background suggests an industrial or refuse setting with earthy and muted tones.
foreground: Round green-yellow sludge creature with crystalline teeth
background: Muted earthy refuse or industrial setting
emotion: placid and unbothered; dull contented expression
